name: Basic Tomato Sauce-Mario
recipeIngredient: 1 Spanish onion, diced into 1/4 inch pieces
4 tablespoons fresh thyme, or 2 teaspoons dried thyme
2 28 ounce cans crushed tomatoes, mixed well with juices
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the olive oil in a large pan over medium heat. Add the diced onions and garlic. Cook, stirring occasionally, until the onions are translucent but not browned, about 10 minutes.
2. Stir in the fresh thyme (or dried thyme) and shredded carrot. Continue cooking for an additional 5 minutes.
3. Add the crushed tomatoes to the pan. Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat to maintain a gentle simmer. Stir occasionally for 30 minutes.
4. Season with salt to taste. Serve immediately or store in the refrigerator for up to one week, or freeze for up to six months.
